content:
# Competitive Landscape: Organizational Memory for AI Agents (March 2026)

## Head-to-Head Comparison

| System | Architecture | Stars | LongMemEval | Key Differentiator |
|--------|-------------|-------|-------------|-------------------|
| **Mem0** | Vector + KG (dual-store) | ~48K | 49.0% | Broadest vector DB support; Y Combinator; SaaS. Graph features Pro-only ($249/mo) |
| **Zep/Graphiti** | Temporal knowledge graph | ~24K | 63.8% | Bi-temporal model; hybrid retrieval (semantic + BM25 + graph) at P95 300ms; zero LLM calls at retrieval |
| **Letta (MemGPT)** | OS-inspired tiers | ~21K | ~83.2% LoCoMo | LLM-controlled memory paging (main/recall/archival); visual debugging |
| **Cognee** | KG + Vector hybrid | ~12K | N/A | 30+ data source connectors; multimodal; on-prem from EUR1,970/mo |
| **Hindsight** | 4-network parallel | ~4K | **91.4%** | TEMPR (4-channel retrieval) + CARA (preference-aware reflection); MIT license |
| **Graphlit** | Cloud-native semantic | N/A | N/A | 30+ live-sync connectors (Slack, etc.); automatic entity extraction |
| **LangMem** | Flat key-value + vector | ~1.3K | N/A | Native LangGraph integration; three memory types |
| **Redis Agent Memory** | Redis-backed + LLM extraction | N/A | N/A | 5-stage lifecycle with forgetting policies; MCP server built-in |
| **SuperLocalMemory V3** | 4-channel retrieval fusion | N/A | 87.7% LoCoMo | Local-first; EU AI Act compliant by architecture |

## Newer Entrants

- **A-MEM** (NeurIPS 2025): Zettelkasten-inspired self-organizing memory; doubled performance on complex reasoning
- **MemOS** (EMNLP 2025 Oral): Personalized memory OS for AI agents
- **Memvid**: Video-based memory encoding for compression
- **SuperMemory**: Cloud platform; 81.6% LongMemEval

## Benchmark Reality Check

LoCoMo and LongMemEval only test fact retrieval from long conversations. No widely adopted benchmark tests whether accumulated memory actually improves long-term agent performance. Whoever builds this evaluation framework first will shape the field.
